title: Bunty Pulls the Strings
writer: J.G. Hawks, Charles Kenyon, Graham Moffat
actors: Leatrice Joy, Russell Simpson, Raymond Hatton
plot: Bunty Biggar, sister of Rab and Jeemy and daughter of Tammas, a stern church elder in a small Scottish village, subtly controls all three through diplomatic tactics. Jeemy confesses to having robbed a bank and begs his father to r...
